histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.Cookie.CommitDurationPerOperation
histogram.summary: Measures the average time spent per cookie operation during a batch commit to the SQLite database. This provides a normalized view of commit performance, helping to identify how efficiently the database handles operations as the batch size changes.

histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.Cookie.LoadDuration
histogram.summary: Records the total time it takes to load all cookies from the SQLite database into memory when the application starts and makes its first network request. This helps us understand the performance impact of cookie loading on startup.

histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.Cookie.PendingOperationsAtCommit
histogram.summary: Records the number of pending cookie operations (add, update, delete) that are being committed to the database in a single batch. This gives an indication of the amount of data at risk of loss if a crash occurs between commits (the "crash gap").

histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.Exit.CookieFlushDuration
histogram.summary: Records the time it takes to flush cookies during a graceful application exit (e.g., via window.h5vcc.system.exit()). This helps to understand the performance of the operation and can serve as a health signal for the storage backend.

histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.Exit.LocalStorageFlushSchedulingDuration
histogram.summary: Records the time it takes to initiate the flush of local storage during a graceful application exit (e.g., via window.h5vcc.system.exit()). As `Flush()` is an asynchronous operation, this metric captures the time until the commit is scheduled, not the completion of the data write to persistent storage.

histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.Exit.LocalStorageFlushSchedulingDuration
histogram.summary: Records the time it takes to initiate the flush of local storage during a graceful application exit (e.g., via window.h5vcc.system.exit()). As `Flush()` is an asynchronous operation, this metric captures the time until the commit is scheduled, not the completion of the data write to persistent storage.

histogram.name: Cobalt.Storage.OnPause.FlushDuration
histogram.summary: Records the time it takes to flush both cookies and local storage during the onPause event on Android. This helps to understand if the operation completes within the short window granted by the OS before the app is killed.

histogram.name: Cobalt.WebContentsObserver.FailedNavigation
histogram.summary: For every navigation in the primary main frame, this boolean is recorded to indicate whether the navigation resulted in a network error. This is used to track the navigation success rate. Aborted navigations are not included.

histogram.name: CPU.Total.UsageInPercentage
histogram.summary: The Percentage of total CPU resources utilized for Cobalt over an interval. 100% indicates all available cores are fully utilized. This metric is recorded periodically (default 5 minutes for Android).

histogram.name: HangWatcher.IsThreadHung.BrowserProcess.RendererThread
histogram.summary: Every 10 seconds, a boolean is recorded to this histogram to indicate whether the RendererThread of a Browser process was hung. The thread is hung if the current work unit started running more than 10 seconds ago. This is emitted only in single process mode(when renderer is a thread inside BrowserProcess).

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.CookieInjectionResult
histogram.summary: Records the outcome of attempting to inject a single cookie into the new Chromium-based storage during migration from legacy Starboard storage.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.CookiesCount
histogram.summary: Records the total number of cookies found in the legacy Starboard storage record during a migration attempt.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.FastPathDuration
histogram.summary: Records the total time taken to check for the migration fast path during startup.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.Outcome
histogram.summary: Records the final outcome of the storage migration process. Tracks whether the migration took the fast path, skipped due to no data, fully succeeded, or failed during read/injection.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.Duration
histogram.summary: Records the total time taken to migrate data from the legacy Starboard storage record to the new Chromium-based storage.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.LocalStorageCount
histogram.summary: Records the total number of localStorage entries found in the legacy Starboard storage record during a migration attempt.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.LocalStorageInjectionResult
histogram.summary: Records the outcome of attempting to inject a single localStorage entry into the new Chromium-based storage during migration from legacy Starboard storage.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.ReadResult
histogram.summary: Records the outcome of attempting to read and parse the legacy Starboard storage record during migration.

histogram.name: Cobalt.StorageMigration.SentinelWriteResult
histogram.summary: Records the result of writing the migration sentinel file to disk.

histogram.name: Memory.Total.PrivateFootprintSwap
histogram.summary: A rough estimate of the private memory footprint that has been swapped out to disk for the Cobalt process. Recorded at regular intervals when memory metrics are emitted.

histogram.name: Memory.Total.VmSize
histogram.summary: The virtual memory size of the Cobalt process. Virtual memory size includes all memory the process can access, including shared libraries, stack, heap, and memory-mapped files. Recorded at regular intervals when memory metrics are emitted.
